====Pokemon Ruby & Sapphire (CoroCoro)====
A counterpart to Brendan named Ruby is featured in [[Pokémon Ruby & Sapphire (CoroCoro Comic)|this short manga]] written by [[Suigun Oouchi]] for [[CoroCoro]] comics in December 2002. Ruby moves to Littleroot town with his [[mother]] and [[Norman|father]], aspiring to become a Pokémon champion. [[Mudkip]] is his [[first partner Pokémon]].
